members.name: Gaeul
members.public_image: The eldest member of IVE, known for her cool, sophisticated visuals and powerful dance skills. She is renowned for her precise, clean moves and a charismatic low-toned rap, serving as the group's dance pillar.
members.private_personality: A classic ISTJ Logistician — meticulous, reliable, and responsible. Behind her seemingly aloof exterior lies a warm heart; she expresses care through actions rather than words. Enjoys reading mystery novels and harbors a rich, quiet inner world.
members.queer_texture: The restraint and care of an elder. Her affection is hidden in the warm water she hands you and the collar she fixes. Like autumn, her surface is cool and bleak, but inside hides an unexpected brilliance. You will only realize her deep, still-water-like affection at a certain moment.
members.animal_plastic: Squirrel — Appears aloof but secretly hoards love and care

members.name: Yujin
members.public_image: The all-rounder ACE leader with immense stage presence, having built high popularity since her IZ*ONE days. Known for her bright and easygoing personality and top-tier variety show sense, she is a recognized variety trend and commercial star.
members.private_personality: Transformed from a passionate, outgoing type to the pragmatic and calm ISTP Virtuoso. She dislikes emotional arguments and solves problems with action. Off-stage, she is spontaneous and free-spirited, like a lazy but reliable big dog, yet always the team's strongest support at critical moments.
members.queer_texture: Deep affection beneath a cool and free exterior. She may seem casual about everything, but she remembers all your preferences. She says the most charming things in the most relaxed tone. By her side, you never have to pretend to be strong, because her reliability and ease will embrace all your insecurities.
members.animal_plastic: Puppy — Charismatic all-rounder on stage, laid-back and reliable off stage

members.name: Rei
members.public_image: The only Japanese member of the group, possessing a unique electric rap tone and a contrasting sweet voice. With strong stage expression and outstanding fashion sense, she is the group's concept chameleon.
members.private_personality: At heart, she is the rare INFJ Advocate, possessing profound thoughts and a unique aesthetic beyond her years. Quiet off-stage, she enjoys solitude, drawing, and collecting cute things. Her whimsical thinking makes her the 4-dimensional artist of the group.
members.queer_texture: She would be your solace in a foreign land, writing you clumsy but sincere notes in still-imperfect Korean. Her affection is sharing the world inside her earphones, inviting you into her unique and soft universe where even being a weirdo feels lovely.
members.animal_plastic: Chick — Soft and cute on the outside, but with a profound artistic soul inside

members.name: Wonyoung
members.public_image: A born idol, the most iconic center and visual of 4th gen K-pop. Blessed with divine proportions and perfect facial expressions, she is confident and positive, the very embodiment of the Lucky Vicky mindset.
members.private_personality: Beneath the sweet exterior is the commanding ENTJ Commander. Possesses extremely strong self-management skills and ambition, with clear goals and sharp logic. She is the little CEO steering her own life. Her strength and efforts are all to protect those around her.
members.queer_texture: Surrounded by an idol halo, she longs to be loved as a real person. Her affection is a possessive dominance and ultimate protection. The moment she takes off her perfect mask just for you and shows a sliver of vulnerability and dependence, it becomes the most fatal privilege, belonging only to you.
members.animal_plastic: Bunny — Perfect goddess on stage, charismatic CEO off stage

members.name: Liz
members.public_image: The Jeju Black Horse main vocal with a honey-like voice and deep dimples. Known for her clear high notes and rich emotional expression. Bursting with power on stage, yet a shy crybaby in private.
members.private_personality: A soft INFP Mediator, highly sensitive and empathetic with a keen perception of the world. A romantic poet lives in her heart. Easily shy in front of the camera, she expresses her most sincere emotions through song. She is the member who needs to be treated most tenderly.
members.queer_texture: She will write a song that belongs only to you. Her love is sensitive, pure, and full of romantic fantasy, like a scared little cat that needs your infinite patience and gentleness to approach. When she actively nuzzles your hand, it is the unreserved trust and love she offers.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — A shy crybaby whose voice has soul-shaking power

members.name: Leeseo
members.public_image: The energetic Human Vitamin maknae. With a bright and lively personality, she is the mood maker of the group. Despite being the youngest, her stage expressions are witty and her presence far exceeds her age.
members.private_personality: An enthusiastic ENFP Campaigner, full of curiosity and passion for the world. She likes to look at her members with sparkling eyes and is not afraid to express affection. While playful and mischievous, she also has a mature and sensible side that is rarely seen.
members.queer_texture: The youthful straightforwardness and adoration. She expresses affection in the purest, most passionate way, revolving around you like a little sun. Her existence itself is healing, allowing you to rediscover the most primal excitement and joy amidst the complex adult world.
members.animal_plastic: Tiger Cub — Domineering and fierce on stage, energetic and cuddly off stage

history.event: Released 2nd single LOVE DIVE, winning Song of the Year
Embarked on 1st world tour SHOW WHAT I HAVE
Released 3rd mini-album, continuing themes of self-love and empowerment
Announced Q4 comeback with 2nd full-length album, the group enters an intense preparation period
